text: Implemented checked Double/index ScratchRequirement composition (sum for simultaneous, max for alternatives), grow-only encapsulated DenseWorkspace storage, exact QR/eigen/CSR requirement reporting, pure eigSymmetricWith, and CSR canonicalizeWith. Added ownership/law/overflow/zero/reuse tests and docs. Verification: 398 linalg+sparse+spectral tests pass on JVM and 398 on Scala.js; benchCompile and optimized JS smoke pass. n=128 JMH: values-only eigen 141264.218 -> 9201.132 B/op (-93.5%), 1126.623 -> 1119.055 us/op; CSR canonicalize 18136.075 -> 11928.072 B/op (-34.2%), 2.719 -> 2.591 us/op. Development receipt updated.
